## Summary

- 

## Image Checklist

- [ ] Added image files under `assets/`.
- [ ] Added or updated matching entries in `assets/sources.json`.
- [ ] Each new entry has `id`, `title`, `answer`, `file`, `clue`, and `provider`.
- [ ] If available, `downloadUrl` and `sourceUrl` are included for traceability.
- [ ] `answer` is either `goose` or `duck`.
- [ ] `file` points to an existing local image in `assets/`.
- [ ] Source and license context are clear, either via `sourceUrl` or PR notes for personal photos.

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `node scripts/validate-assets.js`.
- [ ] Opened the game through a local static server and played at least one round.
